name: File Drop
description: Decentralized, Anonymous, and Secure File Sharing
compose:
name: slashnode-file-drop
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/besoeasy/file-drop:1.4.3
    container_name: file-drop
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      IPFS_TELEMETRY: 'off'
    volumes:
      - app_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3232:3232
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data:
    name: slashnode-file-drop_app_data
